7:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L21",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Same-Machine Only"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's multi-agent sharing works via the same SQLite database file on the same filesystem. Cross-machine sharing requires manual export/import or a future MCP server. If you need HTTP-based memory sharing across machines, consider Hindsight self-hosted instead."}]}]]}]]}]}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Architecture"}]
9:["$","$L22",null,{"chart":"\ngraph TB\n  subgraph Team[\"Agent Team\"]\n      A1[Agent A]\n      A2[Agent B]\n      A3[Agent C]\n  end\n  \n  subgraph Storage[\"Storage\"]\n      DBA[(Agent A DB)]\n      DBB[(Agent B DB)]\n      DBC[(Agent C DB)]\n      DBS[(Shared DB)]\n  end\n  \n  A1 -->|private| DBA\n  A2 -->|private| DBB\n  A3 -->|private| DBC\n  A1 -->|shared| DBS\n  A2 -->|shared| DBS\n  A3 -->|shared| DBS\n"}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Separate Database Instances"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Each agent gets its own ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance. Use separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"db_path"}]," values for isolation, or share a path for coordination:"]}]
c:["$","$L23",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Each agent has its own isolated database\nagent_a = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"agent-a\",\n  db_path=\"/data/agent-a/memories.db\",\n)\n\nagent_b = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"agent-b\",\n  db_path=\"/data/agent-b/memories.db\",\n)\n\n# Agent A stores an observation\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"The API rate limit is 1000 req/min.\",\n  source=\"observation\",\n  importance=0.9,\n)\n\n# Agent B cannot see Agent A's memories\nresults = agent_b.recall(\"API rate limit\")  # Returns nothing from agent-a's DB\n","language":"python"}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Shared Memory Pattern"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["To share knowledge between agents on the same machine, point them at the same database file with different ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," values:"]}]
f:["$","$L23",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Both agents share the same database file\nagent_a = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"agent-a\",\n  db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\",\n)\n\nagent_b = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"agent-b\",\n  db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\",\n)\n\n# Agent A stores team knowledge\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"The API rate limit is 1000 req/min.\",\n  source=\"infrastructure-check\",\n  importance=0.9,\n  scope=\"global\",  # Visible to all sessions\n)\n\n# Agent B can recall shared knowledge\nresults = agent_b.recall(\"API rate limit\")\n","language":"python"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Private vs Shared Context"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":["Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scope"}]," to control what is private vs shared:"]}]
12:["$","$L23",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nagent_a = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"agent-a\", db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\")\n\n# Private to agent-a's session (default)\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"My current subtask: validate user inputs.\",\n  scope=\"session\",\n  importance=0.5,\n)\n\n# Shared with all sessions in this database\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"Deployment target is us-east-1 region.\",\n  scope=\"global\",\n  importance=0.8,\n)\n","language":"python"}]
13:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Cross-Machine Sharing"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":"For sharing memory across different machines, use export/import:"}]
15:["$","$L23",null,{"code":"# On machine A: export shared memories\nagent_a.export_to_file(\"/shared/team-memory-export.json\")\n\n# On machine B: import\nagent_b.import_from_file(\"/shared/team-memory-export.json\")\n","language":"python"}]
16:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L21",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Future: MCP Server"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"A lightweight MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for Mnemosyne BEAM is planned. This will enable cross-machine memory sharing without manual export/import."}]}]]}]]}]}]
17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Deployment"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":"Use a shared volume or network filesystem:"}]
19:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Docker"}],": Named volume mounted to all agents"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Kubernetes"}],": Shared PVC"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fly.io"}],": Same volume mounted to multiple machines"]}],"\n"]}]
1a:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L21",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":"$7:props:children:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"SQLite Concurrency"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite handles multiple readers well but prefers single-writer. For high-write multi-agent scenarios, consider WAL mode or connection pooling."}]}]]}]]}]}]
